popularStory.headline: Marche, Richard  story
popularStory.description: Richard MARCHE was born in 1566 in Sherford, Devon, England, the son of William. He married Joane Martyn in 1590 in Devon, England. They had eight children in 12 years. He died in England on April 29, …

zh.Sherford, Devon, England, Kingdom of Eng: 英國英格蘭戴文黑福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Marche於1566年出生在英國戴文黑福德時，他的父親William Marche27歲，母親Johanne22歲。他於1590年與Joane Martyn在英國戴文黑福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年4月29日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國戴文黑福德。

zh-hans.Sherford, Devon, England, Kingdom of Eng: 英国英格兰戴文黑福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Marche于1566年出生在英国戴文黑福德时，他的父亲William Marche27岁，母亲Johanne22岁。他于1590年与Joane Martyn在英国戴文黑福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年4月29日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国戴文黑福德。

nameMeanings.name: Marche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: March
meanings: English: habitational name from March (Cambridgeshire) or from any of numerous minor English placenames deriving from Middle English marche ‘boundary’ (partly from Old English mearc in the dative-case form mearce, partly from Old French marche). Compare Mark 2.
Catalan: from the personal name March, Catalan equivalent of Mark 1. This surname is also found in southern France.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German march, Middle High German marc(h) ‘mark, sign, boundary’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word (Bavaria).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Marche was born in 1566, in Sherford, Devon, England, his father, William Marche, was 27 and his mother, Johanne, was 22. He married Joane Martyn in 1590, in Sherford, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died before 29 April 1612, in his hometown, and was buried in Sherford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Marche est né en 1566, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Marche, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Johanne, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joane Martyn en 1590, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé avant 29 avril 1612, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Marche 1566 in Sherford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Marche 27 und seine Mutter Johanne 22. Er hat 1590 in Sherford, Devon, England Joane Martyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb vor 29. April 1612 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sherford, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Marche è nato il nel 1566 nel Sherford, Devon, England, il suo padre, William Marche, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Johanne, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joane Martyn nel 1590, nel Sherford, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì prima del 29 aprile 1612, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Sherford, Devon, England.

ja.Sherford, Devonshire, England: イギリスデボンシェルフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Marcheが1566年にイギリスデボンシェルフォードで生まれた時，父William Marcheは27歳，母Johanneは22歳であった。1590年にイギリスデボンシェルフォードでJoane Martynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年4月29日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスデボンシェルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Marche(이)가 1566년 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Marche(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1590년 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 Joane Martyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 4월 29일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Sherford, Devon, England, Kingdom of Eng: Sherford, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Marche nasceu em 1566, em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Marche, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Johanne, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Martyn em 1590, em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 29 de abril de 1612, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Marche родился в 1566 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Marche было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanne, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Martyn в 1590 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер перед 29 апрель 1612 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Marche nació en 1566, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Marche, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Johanne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joane Martyn en 1590, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió antes de 29 de abril de 1612, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra.
